query:
SELECT sl.id, sl.token, sl.surveyId, sl.linkType, sl.isActive, c.source, c.name as customerName
FROM share_links sl
JOIN surveys s ON sl.surveyId = s.id
JOIN customers c ON s.customerId = c.id
WHERE sl.isActive = 1 AND c.source LIKE '%Gulf%'
LIMIT 5;
